description: Use this skill for dispatching Copilot CLI sub-agents (persona-based) to run isolated, non‑interactive, file-piped analyses on large contexts—e.g., security audits/red-team, architecture reviews, deep QA, or scripted persona chains that must run in a fresh model context. Prefer when you need deterministic, severity-tagged findings or automated CLI runs; not for casual Q&A.
